series_metadata.series_description: Records include registration forms or applications and supporting documentation for the Commercial Activity Tax, Petroleum Activity Tax, Financial Institution Tax, Wireless 9-1-1 Charge or Next Generation 9-1-1 Access Fee, and Resort Area Gross Receipts Excise Tax.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 4 years after the account is canceled or closed, then delete. ; Paper: Retain 4 years after the account is canceled or closed, then shred. If scanned, retain for 6 months, after scanned and imaged, then shred., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
